column1: # HOT-PATHS.tsv — machine-read manifest for the hardening-gate CI job (roadmap item 6).
# Parser: scripts/hardening-gate.sh (awk -F tab). Read CHECKLIST.md for the standing law.
# @ZONE lines designate an algorithmic hot ZONE (path prefix). A diff that touches a file
# under a zone with NO data row below = RED (new algorithmic code must register itself).
#   path_prefix  features  filter  min_tests  mode  checklist  gap
#   path_prefix : changed file matches this row iff its path starts with path_prefix
#   features    : cargo features for the test run ("-" = default)
#   filter      : SINGLE-token cargo test filter (module path). cargo takes ONE positional;
#                 multi-token filters match ZERO tests, so every row uses one substring.
#   min_tests   : gate asserts (parsed "N passed") >= min_tests. A floor. Zero-match = RED.
#   checklist   : which of the 4 items are PRESENT for this surface (1=oracle 2=dudect 3=dbg 4=asm)
#   gap         : ledgered missing/deferred coverage, owner-tagged; "-" = none
